issue_title: Emit OL `FAIL` event when manually marking a DAG as failed
issue_body:
### Apache Airflow version

2.9.2

### If "Other Airflow 2 version" selected, which one?

_No response_

### What happened?

Manually marking a DAG as _failed_ doesn't not emit an OL `FAIL` event.

### What you think should happen instead?

An OL `FAIL` event would be emitted when manually marking a DAG as _failed_.

### How to reproduce

To reproduce, start a DAG, then manually mark the DAG as _failed_. Then, view the DAG logs, no OL logs are observed.

### Operating System

N/A

### Versions of Apache Airflow Providers

_No response_

### Deployment

Astronomer

### Deployment details

_No response_

### Anything else?

_No response_

### Are you willing to submit PR?

- [ ] Yes I am willing to submit a PR!

pr_title: dag run state change endpoints notify listeners about state change
pr_body:
When DagRun state changes due to manual or API based actions, listeners are not notified about those. This PR fixes this.

Solves https://github.com/apache/airflow/issues/40735
